title: RXO CEO: Freight Recession Persists, but See Positive Trends
description: Drew Wilkerson, CEO of RXO, discusses the company’s latest quarterly truckload forecast, highlighting an upswing in the trucking market following a period of deflationary pressure. He speaks with Romaine Bostick and Kristine Aquino on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)
